programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: Duane Allman - Song of the South
programme.desc: Duane Allman, the lead guitarist and driving force behind Southern Rock pioneers The Allman Brothers Band, lived a tragically short life, but during his brief career he changed music forever.

programme.title: John Denver - Rocky Mountain High: Live In Japan
programme.desc: Rocky Mountain High: Live In Japan is a 1981 concert from John Denver's 7-show tour of Japan and features a wonderful selection of hits from his career, including: Annie's Song, Calypso, Sunshine On My Shoulders & Thank God I'm A Country Boy.

programme.title: Qello Concerts' Best
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts.

programme.title: Lady Gaga -- Live in London 2013
programme.desc: Lady Gaga's performance at the iTunes Festival in London on Sept. 1, 2013 marks her first full concert since the Born This Way Ball.

programme.title: Elton John: Live in London 2013
programme.desc: Filmed at the Roundhouse in London, this concert film gives fans a live experience from start to finish; Elton John performs his hits: "Tiny Dancer," "Rocket Man," "Your Song," and many more.

programme.title: Sarah Brightman - Symphony in Vienna
programme.desc: Sarah Brightman is an English soprano singer who has won 160 gold and platinum albums in 34 countries. Only the soundtrack to the musical The Phantom of the Opera, played by Sarah, sold more than 40 million copies.

programme.title: Chic: Live in London 2013
programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

programme.title: Of Monsters and Men - Main Square Festival 2013
programme.desc: The Icelandic band Of Monsters and Men perform a fun and entertaining set in sunny Arras, France. The folk story-tellers hit all the right notes!

programme.title: One Direction - Apple Music Festival
programme.desc: One Direction performs a stellar set at the 2015 edition of the Apple Music Festival. Be prepared to sing along to their catchy chart-topping hits!

programme.title: The Killers - Live at Rock Am Ring
programme.desc: The Killers perform at Rock Am Ring, a music festival that takes place annually at the Nürburgring Race Track in Western Germany, with tracks like When You Were Young and The World We Live In.

programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ is a deep dive into jazz without boundaries, offering a selection of concerts, major festival performances, rare documentaries, intimate portraits, and behind-the-scenes footage of artists from around the world.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Singer Jerry Butler headlines this episode, together with his back-up group, Peaches. Highlights of their numbers are "Make It Easy on Yourself" and "Brand New Me".

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: An all jazz line-up on this edition of Soul! features pianist Horace Silver at the electric keyboard, Lee Morgan on trumpet and 22-year old Bobbi Humphrey playing the flute. They are joined by vocalists Andy and Salome Bey.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: One of the great Motown acts of the past several years headlines the show, performing the hit, "I Heard It through the Grapevine", and other selections.

programme.title: James Brown: The Golden Greats
programme.desc: Experience

programme.title: Wu-Tang Clan: Of Mics & Men
programme.desc: The RZA, The GZA, 'Ol Dirty Bastard, Inspectah Deck, Raekwon The Chef, U-God, Ghostface Killah, Cappadonna, Masta Killa and Method Man cut a song - "Protect Ya Neck" - and the world hasn't been the same since.

programme.title: Wu-Tang Clan: Of Mics & Men
programme.desc: Wu-Tang Clan's underground rap single starts to blow up and business moved fast. Despite their success, things were still going on back home in the projects that affected their friends and family — the Wu weren't immune to it. Nor were they bulletproof.

programme.title: Wu-Tang Clan: Of Mics & Men
programme.desc: The sweet smell of success was intoxicating but the death of a friend changed the way each member saw the world and the Wu. The members would all go on to have successful solo careers, and Wu-Tang's global footprint was massive.

programme.title: Wu-Tang Clan: Of Mics & Men
programme.desc: Twenty-five years in, a family looks to cement a legacy. 'Ol Dirty is dead. Everybody has gone solo. The 'W' is fading. Yet Wu-Tang Clan, their logo, their music and their message remain indelible fixtures in the history of music and America.

programme.title: Bob Marley: Roots of the Man
programme.desc: Robert Nesta Marley, known across the globe as Bob Marley, was the first and debatably only superstar ever to emerge from the third world.

programme.title: Whitney Houston: We Will Always Love You
programme.desc: In this film we pay tribute to one of the worlds most loved and best selling music artists of all time. Whitney Elizabeth Houston first showed the vocal range and star quality at the tender age of 11.

programme.title: Louis Armstrong: 100th Anniversary
programme.desc: Louis Armstrong dazzled millions of fans with his virtuoso trumpet playing and his irresistible vocal style. Celebrate his life as past performances are revisited and first hand accounts of his life are given by individuals touched by him.

programme.title: Johnny Mathis: In Concert
programme.desc: Johnny Mathis is one of a handful of artists who truly deserves a legendary status. Since his impact on scene in the 1950s, Johnny has maintained a high levels of performance, both on recordings and on stage.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Swim in the warm water, nap in the luxurious green grass - today Bob Ross creates a wonderful summer mountain scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bundle up and endure the cold weater in this snow filled adventure; Bob Ross paints a wintry mountain scene using only Grey and White tones.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Experience the mystique of snowflakes gently tumbling in the silence of the forest. Join Bob Ross for this lovely winter masterpiece!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a spectacular mountain scene in a faux matte; a real masterpiece cleverly framed in an intriguing new idea!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: So quickly, Bob Ross paints this beautiful and peaceful mountain valley - so many layers and layers on the canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Journey into the country with Bob Ross and watch how he creates this magnificent painting by adding a large old mill into the heart of the forest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this painting Bob Ross emphasizes a slow river winding around colorful foliage, with the final embers of sunlight ahead.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest Artist Dan Jester shares with us the beauty of sweet lavender clusters nestled in the heart of a snowy winter forest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross spills an amazing cornucopia of red, brown, green and gold colors into this gorgeous fall mountain masterpiece - a real audience favorite.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Find the glistening sun peeking through the trees in this wintery scene; Bob Ross creates a cold day warmed by daystar radiance.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: See the amazing glacier-like peaks Bob Ross creates in this icy panorama; grab your painting knife and do this one too.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a still lake that captures the reflection of some trees as a range of rugged mountains stand guard in the background.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: The soothing sounds of a cascading waterfall come to mind in this charming Bob Ross landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Powerful mountains softened with grassy meadows and little evergreens framing a nice shiny mere - this is a lovely Bob Ross masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Today Bob Ross paints a warm and elegant snow-kissed scene with a little cabin snuggled deeply into the embrace of foothills, evergreens and bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Stroll down to the river and cast your line with Bob Ross from the bridge - join in the fun and paint this masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Drive through mountain country with Bob Ross and happen upon a ridge of thick, rich evergreens gracing the hollow below.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses monochromatic tones to convey the icy coldness of a silvery lake surrounded by lacy trees and bushes - brr!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy this Bob Ross scene that includes luxurious green foliage and an old weathered trestle-bridge placed lovingly amongst all the beauty.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Sneak away into the cold shadows with Bob Ross and enjoy the beauty of a winter night at the foot of a large fierce waterfall.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes us to an isolated cabin deep in the woods on a cold, snowy winter day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross travels with his paintbrushes into the density of an evening grove and discovers the beauty of a gentle, hushed rippling river.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes a detour from the trail and discovers a rarely used trail through country woods.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes you to a lovely spot deep in the woods where the seclusion, silence, and beauty offer serenity to the soul.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Even a tiny shanty by the pond can be a warm place in the dead of winter - Bob Ross shows us how to make a snow scene glow!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the still of the night, trees reflect off the glistening pond and cool breeze of blows as Bob Ross takes you on this black canvas adventure.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross on a clear windless day, where reflections are so smooth they appear to be crystal likenesses of the mountains above.

programme.title: Julia At Home
programme.desc: Julia makes grilled chicken, buttery grilled corn, and a parmesan orzo salad. And a lemon pie for dessert.

programme.title: Julia At Home
programme.desc: Julia makes chilled tomato soup, cheese straws, crab cakes, watermelon salad, and raspberry pistachio buckles.

programme.desc: A band of no-good punks beat a guy for driving too slow and steal his mechanical pencil, before arriving to pick up their missing member Jamie, the son of the man they've just beaten.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts

programme.title: Hunter

programme.title: Hunter

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: The only clue in a series of murders is a trail of police-issued ammunition that leads Hunter and McCall to suspect a colleague as the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Ratings seeking stunts by TV talk show hosts Darren & Mary have tragic results.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: When they capture a woman who took part in a jailbreak, she agrees to testify in New Orleans, which is where Walker and his partner are assigned to escort her to, much to the chagrin of Trivette, who had vacation plans instead.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker gets a sinking feeling in his guts when, after arresting two guys for trying to rob a club and shooting the bartender, Alex sets them free and won't give them a reason as to why it all happened.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: When a woman goes against the State Police's beliefs that her father was a casualty of his own drunk driving, Walker believes her and stumbles across an illegal ring of toxic dumpers.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: The Return Of A Man Called Horse

programme.title: Miami Blues
programme.desc: An ex-con (Alec Baldwin) tiptoes on the borderline of psychotic behavior, playing cops and robbers on both sides of the law. He robs and kills one minute and poses as a cop the next in this thriller with a comic edge.

programme.title: Face/Off

programme.desc: The story begins as an expedition lands on the island of Bengalla, seeking the Skulls of Touganda. Believed to harness an energy force of power, they could spell disaster for mankind.

programme.title: Project Almanac
programme.desc: When five teens discover a machine that can send them back in time, the possibilities seem endless. But by changing the past, they have threatened the future of our world. Can they undo the damage they have unleashed before it’s too late?

programme.title: Super 8
programme.desc: In the summer of 1979, a group of friends in a small Ohio town witness a catastrophic train crash while making a Super 8 movie and soon suspect that it was not an accident.

programme.desc: When mysterious spacecraft touch down across the globe, an elite team - led by expert translator Louise Banks (Academy Award® nominee Amy Adams) – races against time to decipher their intent.

programme.title: Source Code
programme.desc: Jake Gyllenhaal stars in this action thriller about a man who awakens in another man’s body to discover only he has the ability to stop a terrorist attack on a commuter train.

programme.desc: There's nothing more exciting than trying to keep up with the Joneses in Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade. Indy's Nazi enemies are back and have kidnapped his father, in their effort to locate the sacred Holy Grail.

programme.title: Marlowe
programme.desc: Marlowe, a gripping thriller set in 1939 LA. Hard-boiled private eye, Philip Marlowe, is hired to find the lover of a glamorous heiress. Unexpectedly, Marlowe finds himself embroiled in a deadly mystery that he's determined to either solve or die trying.

programme.title: The Grey

programme.title: Terminal
programme.desc: Two assassins carrying out a sinister mission, a teacher battling a fatal illness, an enigmatic janitor and a waitress leading a dangerous double life.

programme.desc: Rookie cops Jonah Hill and Channing Tatum go undercover as students to bust a high school drug ring - with hysterically disastrous results!

programme.desc: Vincent Price slowly goes crazy because he thinks his wife was buried alive (a plot between his wife and her lover to get his money). Now totally insane, he starts to murder.

programme.title: The Fall Of The House Of Usher (1960)
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman's suitor arrives to ask her hand in marriage, the doors of the mysterious house of Usher fling open...and terror begins.

programme.title: Barbarella

programme.desc: In this sequel to Grumpy Old Men, a vivacious Italian beauty attempts to convert Wabasha, Minnesota's cherished bait store into a romantic Italian restaurant.

programme.desc: What if your own family stood in the way of everything you worked for? Bobby Green (Joaquin Phoenix) has forsaken his name to escape his family and their tradition in law enforcement to pursue his ambitions as a Brooklyn nightclub owner. Rated R

programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio and Oscar-nominee Kate Winslet light up the screen as Jack and Rose, the young lovers who find one another on the maiden voyage of the "unsinkable" R.M.S. Titanic.

programme.desc: A powerful, award-winning film about an inner-city junior high school teacher with a drug habit who forms an unlikely friendship with one of his students after she discovers his secret.

programme.desc: A tender and sweeping story about what roots us, Minari follows a Korean-American family that moves to an Arkansas farm in search of their own American Dream.

programme.desc: Winona Ryder and Academy Award(r)-winner Angelina Jolie are the certifiable stars of Claymoore Hospital's South Bell ward in this wry adaptation of Susanna Kaysen's best-selling memoir.

programme.title: The Gambler
programme.desc: Jim Bennett (Mark Wahlberg) is a professor leading a double life as a high-stakes gambler. When he borrows money from dangerous gangsters, he places the lives of his loved ones in mortal danger and must risk everything to keep from losing it all.

programme.title: Uncut Gems
programme.desc: A charismatic jeweler (Adam Sandler) makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime.

programme.title: Hard Boiled [English Subtitled]

programme.title: Uncut Gems
programme.desc: A charismatic jeweler (Adam Sandler) makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime.

programme.title: Hoodlum
programme.desc: 1930's New York. The black community of Harlem faces the same indignities as countless millions of refugees. If the seeds of Harlem's urban power would not grow in the White city, the Black underground would form to take control.

programme.desc: Based on the 1996 novel, this is a mixture of thriller and black comedy. Harry Pendel is the tailor to the powerful of Panama. Harry is known for his storytelling and suits, but soon his tales carry lethal repercussions.

programme.title: The Manchurian Candidate
programme.desc: As the entire nation watches the presidential campaign hurtle towards Election Day, one soldier races to uncover the conspiracy behind it - a conspiracy that seeks to destroy democracy itself.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: Mitch joins a prosperous Memphis firm that affords Mitch and his wife an affluent lifestyle beyond their wildest dreams. But when FBI agents confront him with evidence of corruption and murder within the firm, Mitch sets out to find the truth.

programme.title: Side Effects
programme.desc: A woman turns to prescription medication as a way of handling her anxiety concerning her husband's upcoming release from prison.

programme.title: The Manchurian Candidate
programme.desc: As the entire nation watches the presidential campaign hurtle towards Election Day, one soldier races to uncover the conspiracy behind it - a conspiracy that seeks to destroy democracy itself.

programme.title: Identity
programme.desc: What if every choice we ever make was already made for us? What if there really were no coincidences in life and our destinies were already predetermined? Ten strangers with secrets are brought together in a savage rainstorm. Rated: R

programme.desc: Chloë Grace Moretz and Julianne Moore star in this exhilarating reimagining of Stephen King's iconic best-seller, 'Carrie.' After merciless taunting and abuse, events spiral out of control until the terrifying conclusion of this horror story.

programme.title: Stephen King's A Good Marriage
programme.desc: With a serial killer on the loose and a stranger stalking her family, a dedicated wife unveils a sinister secret about her husband that threatens their marriage, and their lives.

programme.desc: A young man tries to deal with the childhood terror that has affected his life.

programme.title: Soul Survivors

programme.desc: The greatest American Heroes are back, and they've been set up to take the fall for a heinous crime they didn't commit. Roadblock (Dwayne Johnson) leads a new team (including Channing Tatum and Bruce Willis) on this high-octane adventure.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: The Host (2013)

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: Nearly twenty years after the cult TV show Galaxy Quest was cancelled, the alumni cast is asked for help by an alien species in order to save the universe.

programme.title: Texas Rangers

programme.title: South of Heaven, West of Hell
programme.desc: A small-town marshal, tormented by the puzzling conditions that surround him, is forced to confront his demons at an unexpected and untraditional 'family reunion'.

programme.title: True Grit (2010)
